description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On October 10th, a test vehicle operating in manual driving mode was stopped at a red light while southbound on Lawrence Expressway at 
Sandia Avenue in Sunnyvale when a Toyota Camry made light contact from the rear.  No injuries were reported and law enforcement was 
not called to the scene.  Test vehicle sensors were damaged.
Print
Clear Form
